ThingDef.label: M4 (M4 URGI)
ThingDef.description: A modern, mission-ready assault rifle built around an improved upper receiver architecture. It emphasizes modularity and adaptability, featuring a free-floating handguard designed for seamless integration of optics, aiming devices, and tactical accessories. Balanced handling, controllable recoil, and a consistent rate of fire make it effective across close to mid-range engagements, allowing operators to tailor the platform to aggressive, mobile fighting or more deliberate, precision-focused roles.

ThingDef.label: M4 INF (M4 URGI)
ThingDef.description: A modern, mission-ready assault rifle built around an improved upper receiver architecture. It emphasizes modularity and adaptability, featuring a free-floating handguard designed for seamless integration of optics, aiming devices, and tactical accessories. Balanced handling, controllable recoil, and a consistent rate of fire make it effective across close to mid-range engagements, allowing operators to tailor the platform to aggressive, mobile fighting or more deliberate, precision-focused roles. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range.

ThingDef.label: M4 CQC (M4 URGI)
ThingDef.description: A modern, mission-ready assault rifle built around an improved upper receiver architecture. It emphasizes modularity and adaptability, featuring a free-floating handguard designed for seamless integration of optics, aiming devices, and tactical accessories. Balanced handling, controllable recoil, and a consistent rate of fire make it effective across close to mid-range engagements, allowing operators to tailor the platform to aggressive, mobile fighting or more deliberate, precision-focused roles. CQC stands for Close Quaters Combat. This variant is designed for upclose encounters like room clearing and urban warfare. Sacrifices long range for better short range accuracy.

ThingDef.label: M4 SF (M4 URGI)
ThingDef.description: A modern, mission-ready assault rifle built around an improved upper receiver architecture. It emphasizes modularity and adaptability, featuring a free-floating handguard designed for seamless integration of optics, aiming devices, and tactical accessories. Balanced handling, controllable recoil, and a consistent rate of fire make it effective across close to mid-range engagements, allowing operators to tailor the platform to aggressive, mobile fighting or more deliberate, precision-focused roles. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: M4 GL (M4 URGI)
ThingDef.description: A modern, mission-ready assault rifle built around an improved upper receiver architecture. It emphasizes modularity and adaptability, featuring a free-floating handguard designed for seamless integration of optics, aiming devices, and tactical accessories. Balanced handling, controllable recoil, and a consistent rate of fire make it effective across close to mid-range engagements, allowing operators to tailor the platform to aggressive, mobile fighting or more deliberate, precision-focused roles. GL stands for Grenade Launcher. This variant comes equipped with a Grenade Launcher that is manually targeted. Allows an infantryman to blow up light armour, cover and anything behind it.

ThingDef.label: M4 UBS (M4 URGI)
ThingDef.description: A modern, mission-ready assault rifle built around an improved upper receiver architecture. It emphasizes modularity and adaptability, featuring a free-floating handguard designed for seamless integration of optics, aiming devices, and tactical accessories. Balanced handling, controllable recoil, and a consistent rate of fire make it effective across close to mid-range engagements, allowing operators to tailor the platform to aggressive, mobile fighting or more deliberate, precision-focused roles. UBS stands for Underbarrel Shotgun. This variant is equipped with a Masterkey shotgun designed to breach doors or breach the chests of apporaching combatants. Either or, something will have a massive hole in it.

ThingDef.label: M4 THM (M4 URGI)
ThingDef.description: A modern, mission-ready assault rifle built around an improved upper receiver architecture. It emphasizes modularity and adaptability, featuring a free-floating handguard designed for seamless integration of optics, aiming devices, and tactical accessories. Balanced handling, controllable recoil, and a consistent rate of fire make it effective across close to mid-range engagements, allowing operators to tailor the platform to aggressive, mobile fighting or more deliberate, precision-focused roles. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: M4 IAR (M4 URGI)
ThingDef.description: A modern, mission-ready assault rifle built around an improved upper receiver architecture. It emphasizes modularity and adaptability, featuring a free-floating handguard designed for seamless integration of optics, aiming devices, and tactical accessories. Balanced handling, controllable recoil, and a consistent rate of fire make it effective across close to mid-range engagements, allowing operators to tailor the platform to aggressive, mobile fighting or more deliberate, precision-focused roles. IAR stands for Infantry Autorifle. It is not as easy just to carry more bullets into battle. Personel have to modify their weapons to handle the weight of more rounds. While harder to move around, the gun turns into a LMG.

ThingDef.label: M4 SNP(M4 URGI)
ThingDef.description: A modern, mission-ready assault rifle built around an improved upper receiver architecture. It emphasizes modularity and adaptability, featuring a free-floating handguard designed for seamless integration of optics, aiming devices, and tactical accessories. Balanced handling, controllable recoil, and a consistent rate of fire make it effective across close to mid-range engagements, allowing operators to tailor the platform to aggressive, mobile fighting or more deliberate, precision-focused roles. SNP stands for Sniper. Not everyone is a Marksman but that doesn't stop someone from trying. Lowering the ammo count for more better LR accuracy and range.

ThingDef.label: M4 Classic (M4A1)
ThingDef.description: A modern, mission-ready assault rifle built around an improved upper receiver architecture. It emphasizes modularity and adaptability, featuring a free-floating handguard designed for seamless integration of optics, aiming devices, and tactical accessories. Balanced handling, controllable recoil, and a consistent rate of fire make it effective across close to mid-range engagements, allowing operators to tailor the platform to aggressive, mobile fighting or more deliberate, precision-focused roles. Special Variant. Someone doesn't like Polymer. The user has decided to remove most of the plastic off the gun and replaced with classic M4 parts. This variants replaces the chemfuel cost with steel.

ThingDef.label: M4 Iraq (M4A1)
ThingDef.description: A modern, mission-ready assault rifle built around an improved upper receiver architecture. Balanced handling, controllable recoil, and a consistent rate of fire make it effective across close to mid-range engagements, allowing operators to tailor the platform to aggressive, mobile fighting or more deliberate, precision-focused roles. Special Variant. No one truely leaves the desert. Decked out to resemble a loadout similar to what was seen in the fields of Iraq. This is the CQC variant for the M4 Classic.

ThingDef.label: TAQ 56 (SCAR-L)
ThingDef.description: A modular service rifle built to provide flexibility across diverse combat environments. Designed to replace the M4, it emphasizes durability, ergonomic handling, and compatibility with modern optics and accessories, making it suitable for both close-quarters and mid-range engagements.

ThingDef.label: TAQ 56 INF (SCAR-L)
ThingDef.description: A modular service rifle built to provide flexibility across diverse combat environments. Designed for an intermediate cartridge, it emphasizes durability, ergonomic handling, and compatibility with modern optics and accessories, making it suitable for both close-quarters and mid-range engagements. INF stands for Infantry. This variant represents the standardise weapon used by a soldier. It's good in build and good at medium to long range. INF stands for Infantry. ThingDef.description: A modernized assault rifle that returns to the 7.62 cartridge, diverging from the earlier 5.45‑caliber of Soviet Rifles. Retaining the platform’s well‑known reliability, it emphasizes durability and consistent performance across a wide range of combat conditions.

ThingDef.label: M16 (M16A4)
ThingDef.description: A full-length service rifle characterized by its orderly profile and controlled three-round burst firing mode. Designed around stability and repeatability, it reflects a methodical approach to infantry combat that favors precision and fire discipline over excess.

ThingDef.label: M16 INF (M16A4)
ThingDef.description: A full-length service rifle characterized by its orderly profile and controlled three-round burst firing mode. Designed around stability and repeatability, it reflects a methodical approach to infantry combat that favors precision and fire discipline over excess.

ThingDef.label: M16 CQC (M16A4)
ThingDef.description: A full-length service rifle characterized by its orderly profile and controlled three-round burst firing mode. Designed around stability and repeatability, it reflects a methodical approach to infantry combat that favors precision and fire discipline over excess.

It is not as easy just to carry more bullets into battle. Personel have to modify their weapons to handle the weight of more rounds. While harder to move around, the gun turns into a LMG.

ThingDef.label: M16 SNP (M16A4)
ThingDef.description: A full-length service rifle characterized by its orderly profile and controlled three-round burst firing mode. Designed around stability and repeatability, it reflects a methodical approach to infantry combat that favors precision and fire discipline over excess.

ThingDef.label: M16 Classic (M16A2)
ThingDef.description: A full-length service rifle characterized by its orderly profile and controlled three-round burst firing mode. Designed around stability and repeatability, it reflects a methodical approach to infantry combat that favors precision and fire discipline over excess. Special Variant. This weapon of iconic status was mostly constructed of steel and aluminum. Polymer wasn't as widespread back in the day. This variant removes the chemfuel cost for steel.

ThingDef.label: M16 Classic GL (M16A2)
ThingDef.description: A full-length service rifle characterized by its orderly profile and controlled three-round burst firing mode. Designed around stability and repeatability, it reflects a methodical approach to infantry combat that favors precision and fire discipline over excess. Special Variant. During the Cold War, Grenade Launchers were in their infancy. The first to be made was on the M16 platform and took over the entire handguard of the gun. Now troopers were able to Grenadier without switching their weapon. This variant adds a GL to the M16 Classic.

ThingDef.label: M16 Iraq (M16A2)
ThingDef.description: A full-length service rifle characterized by its orderly profile and controlled three-round burst firing mode. Designed around stability and repeatability, it reflects a methodical approach to infantry combat that favors precision and fire discipline over excess. Special Variant. During the Iraq War, the M16 was starting to be phased out for the new M4 platform. However, this did not stop soldiers from going into battle with it however. This variants adds some INF variant traits to a GL variant.

ThingDef.label: M16 Old School (M16A1)
ThingDef.description: A full-length service rifle characterized by its orderly profile and controlled three-round burst firing mode. Designed around stability and repeatability, it reflects a methodical approach to infantry combat that favors precision and fire discipline over excess. Special Variant. The Kastov 47 (AK-47) greatly changed the gun market with its release in the Soviet Union. Able to provide accuracte fire at rapid pace. The US needed to adjust to this new behemoth and make the M16A1. However, the first implimentations were not great. This variants sacrifices some stats for earlier Tech Tree access.

ThingDef.label: Kastov 74U (AKS-74U)
ThingDef.description: A highly compact carbine configured for use in confined environments. Its shortened layout prioritizes maneuverability and rapid handling, making it suitable for vehicle crews, security roles, and close-range engagements.

ThingDef.label: Kastov 545 (AK-105)
ThingDef.description: A compact modern assault rifle with a purposeful, utilitarian presence. Designed for mobility without abandoning the platform’s familiar character, it balances handling and reliability in environments where space, speed, and durability matter most.

ThingDef.label: Kastov 545 CQC (AK-105)
ThingDef.description: A compact modern assault rifle with a purposeful, utilitarian presence. Designed for mobility without abandoning the platform’s familiar character, it balances handling and reliability in environments where space, speed, and durability matter most.

ThingDef.label: Kastov 545 SF (AK-105)
ThingDef.description: A compact modern assault rifle with a purposeful, utilitarian presence. Designed for mobility without abandoning the platform’s familiar character, it balances handling and reliability in environments where space, speed, and durability matter most. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: Kastov 545 GL (AK-105)
ThingDef.description: A compact modern assault rifle with a purposeful, utilitarian presence. Designed for mobility without abandoning the platform’s familiar character, it balances handling and reliability in environments where space, speed, and durability matter most. GL stands for Grenade Launcher. This variant comes equipped with a Grenade Launcher that is manually targeted. Allows an Infantryman to blow up light armour, cover and anything behind it.

ThingDef.label: Kastov 545 UBS (AK-105)
ThingDef.description: A compact modern assault rifle with a purposeful, utilitarian presence. Designed for mobility without abandoning the platform’s familiar character, it balances handling and reliability in environments where space, speed, and durability matter most. UBS stands for Underbarrel Shotgun. This variant is equipped with a GL with a single flechette round designed to breach doors or breach the chests of apporaching combatants. Either or, something will have a massive hole in it.

ThingDef.label: Kastov 545 THM (AK-105)
ThingDef.description: A compact modern assault rifle with a purposeful, utilitarian presence. Designed for mobility without abandoning the platform’s familiar character, it balances handling and reliability in environments where space, speed, and durability matter most. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: Kastov 545 IAR (AK-105)
ThingDef.description: A compact modern assault rifle with a purposeful, utilitarian presence. Designed for mobility without abandoning the platform’s familiar character, it balances handling and reliability in environments where space, speed, and durability matter most. IAR stands for Infantry Autorifle. It is not as easy just to carry more bullets into battle. Personel have to modify their weapons to handle the weight of more rounds. While harder to move around, the gun turns into a LMG.

ThingDef.label: Kastov 545 SNP (AK-105)
ThingDef.description: A compact modern assault rifle with a purposeful, utilitarian presence. Designed for mobility without abandoning the platform’s familiar character, it balances handling and reliability in environments where space, speed, and durability matter most.

ThingDef.label: Kastov 545 Zenitco (AK-105)
ThingDef.description: A compact modern assault rifle with a purposeful, utilitarian presence. Designed for mobility without abandoning the platform’s familiar character, it balances handling and reliability in environments where space, speed, and durability matter most. Special Variant. Zenitco is a famous polymer gun part producer in Russia. Famous for its sheer black design, vent holes and a lot of Picatinny Rails. This variant replaces polymer costs with steel.

ThingDef.description: A modular carbine built to accommodate a wide range of configurations and mission requirements. Its compact layout and modern design emphasize adaptability, allowing it to perform effectively across close‑quarters and mid‑range engagements.

ThingDef.label: TR-76 Geist NATO (Malyuk)
ThingDef.description: A modern bullpup rifle developed from an existing service‑weapon lineage, reconfigured to reduce overall length while retaining a full‑length barrel. Its compact layout and updated interfaces emphasize efficiency of space and compatibility with contemporary optics and accessories, suited to modern infantry use. Special Variants. Ukraine mostly obtained its attachments from Russia before 2014. But it was the Ukranian Coup of 2014 that stopped all supply. Thus Ukraine stared to trade with NATO to get attachments. This variant is the INF variant but swaps the Russian attachments for American ones.

ThingDef.label: Holger 416 UBS (HK 416)
ThingDef.description: A modern service rifle emphasizing mechanical consistency and refined manufacturing. Its external layout follows familiar patterns, while internal design choices reflect a focus on reliability, controllable operation, and compatibility with contemporary infantry equipment and accessories. UBS stands for Underbarrel Shotgun. This variant is equipped with a Masterkey shotgun designed to breach doors or breach the chests of approaching combatants. Either or, something will have a massive hole in it.

ThingDef.label: Holger 416 THM (HK 416)
ThingDef.description: A modern service rifle emphasizing mechanical consistency and refined manufacturing. Its external layout follows familiar patterns, while internal design choices reflect a focus on reliability, controllable operation, and compatibility with contemporary infantry equipment and accessories. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: Holger 416 SNP (HK 416)
ThingDef.description: A modern service rifle emphasizing mechanical consistency and refined manufacturing. Its external layout follows familiar patterns, while internal design choices reflect a focus on reliability, controllable operation, and compatibility with contemporary infantry equipment and accessories.

ThingDef.label: GRIM X (Grot B)
ThingDef.description: A modular bullpup assault rifle combining compact form with full-length barrel performance. Its ergonomic design and configurable components allow operators to maintain control and precision in sustained engagements, offering versatility and reliability across a variety of combat scenarios.

ThingDef.label: GRIM X SF (Grot B)
ThingDef.description: A modular bullpup assault rifle combining compact form with full-length barrel performance. Its ergonomic design and configurable components allow operators to maintain control and precision in sustained engagements, offering versatility and reliability across a variety of combat scenarios. SF stands for Special Forces. This variant is equipped with a supressor and more quality teched gear. Perfect for anyone who needs to be stealthy and efficient.

ThingDef.label: GRIM X GL (Grot B)
ThingDef.description: A modular bullpup assault rifle combining compact form with full-length barrel performance. Its ergonomic design and configurable components allow operators to maintain control and precision in sustained engagements, offering versatility and reliability across a variety of combat scenarios. GL stands for Grenade Launcher. This variant comes equipped with a Grenade Launcher that is manually targeted. Allows an Infantryman to blow up light armour, cover and anything behind it.

ThingDef.label: GRIM X UBS (Grot B)
ThingDef.description: A modular bullpup assault rifle combining compact form with full-length barrel performance. Its ergonomic design and configurable components allow operators to maintain control and precision in sustained engagements, offering versatility and reliability across a variety of combat scenarios. UBS stands for Underbarrel Shotgun. This variant is equipped with a Masterkey shotgun designed to breach doors or breach the chests of approaching combatants. Either or, something will have a massive hole in it.

ThingDef.label: GRIM X THM (Grot B)
ThingDef.description: A modular bullpup assault rifle combining compact form with full-length barrel performance. Its ergonomic design and configurable components allow operators to maintain control and precision in sustained engagements, offering versatility and reliability across a variety of combat scenarios. THM stands for Thermals. This variant is equipped with a Thermal Scope. Being able to see your target lit up like a Christmas Tree makes target acquisition easier. However, when the target gets closer it becomes harder to see.

ThingDef.label: GRIM X IAR (Grot B)
ThingDef.description: A modular bullpup assault rifle combining compact form with full-length barrel performance. Its ergonomic design and configurable components allow operators to maintain control and precision in sustained engagements, offering versatility and reliability across a variety of combat scenarios. IAR stands for Infantry Autorifle. It is not as easy just to carry more bullets into battle. Personel have to modify their weapons to handle the weight of more rounds. While harder to move around, the gun turns into a LMG.
